name: Canadian Finance Planner
description_en: A personal financial planning partner built for Canadians—conducts financial interviews, builds complete plans, and generates interactive dashboards covering budgeting, saving, debt, RRSPs, TFSAs, RESPs, CPP, OAS, retirement, and tax optimization.
description_zh: 为加拿大人打造的个人理财规划伙伴——进行财务访谈、构建完整计划,并生成交互式仪表盘,覆盖预算、储蓄、债务、RRSP、TFSA、RESP、CPP、OAS、退休与税务优化。
long_en: Turns an open-ended 'help me with my money' into a structured plan with ongoing coaching and check-ins, calibrated to Canadian accounts and government benefits.
long_zh: 把笼统的「帮我理财」变成结构化的计划,并提供持续的辅导与复盘,针对加拿大账户与政府福利做了校准。
sec_note_en: Collects personal financial details to build plans; it is educational, Canada-specific, and not a substitute for a licensed financial advisor.
sec_note_zh: 会收集个人财务细节以制定计划;内容为教育性质、面向加拿大,且不能替代持牌理财顾问。
